---
name: Question or Other
about: Ask a question, report a documentation gap, or raise something 
       that does not fit the bug or feature categories
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## What is your question or topic?
Describe what you are trying to understand or achieve.

## What have you already tried?
- Checked the README? Yes / No
- Checked CONTRIBUTING.md? Yes / No
- Searched existing issues? Yes / No

Describe any steps you have already taken to find an answer.

## Context

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Mapillary Explorer version | e.g. 4.2.0 |
| ArcGIS Experience Builder version | e.g. 1.19 |
| Topic area | e.g. Installation / Configuration / Turbo Mode / Coverage Analysis / Contributing |

## Additional Information
Any screenshots, error messages, or links that help explain your question.
